evals.prompt: Use langextract to extract medication names and dosages from the following clinical note: 'Patient is prescribed metformin 500mg twice daily and lisinopril 10mg once daily.'
evals.expected_output: Agent installs langextract, defines a prompt and ExampleData with Extraction objects, calls lx.extract() with a Gemini model, and prints the extracted medication entities with their dosages.
assertions: lx.extract() is called with prompt_description and examples arguments
ExampleData and Extraction classes from lx.data are used
Output contains at least two extractions: one for metformin, one for lisinopril
extraction_class and extraction_text fields are set on each Extraction

evals.prompt: Extract named entities from a long document at https://www.gutenberg.org/files/1513/1513-0.txt using langextract with 3 passes and 20 workers, then save results and generate an HTML visualization.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls lx.extract() with extraction_passes=3, max_workers=20, then calls lx.io.save_annotated_documents() to produce a JSONL file, then calls lx.visualize() and writes the HTML output to disk.
assertions: lx.extract() called with extraction_passes=3 and max_workers=20
lx.io.save_annotated_documents() is called with the result
lx.visualize() is called on the saved JSONL path
An HTML file is written to disk

evals.prompt: Run langextract using a local Ollama model gemma2:2b instead of Gemini to extract entities from a text string.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls lx.extract() with model_id='gemma2:2b', model_url='http://localhost:11434', fence_output=False, and use_schema_constraints=False.

evals.prompt: I need to process 50 clinical reports stored as a list of strings with langextract and save to JSONL.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates a list of lx.data.Document objects (one per report), passes them to lx.extract() as text_or_documents, collects the list of AnnotatedDocument results, and calls lx.io.save_annotated_documents() on the results.
assertions: lx.data.Document objects are created for each report
text_or_documents receives a list of Document objects
lx.io.save_annotated_documents() is called on the list of results
